title: Horror Modpack
description:
It's a simple horror modpack, made by a little gamer, and I recommend playing it with friends.
Have fun! And also fear!
body:
Hello,
This modpack isn't for newbies. I recommend playing it in single player for the best experience. You should download it because I guarantee you'll be terrified by the horror mods, both popular and lesser-known. There are also resource packs that enhance the setting.
What are you waiting for? Download it! and leave a like

It's a ModPack that contains the following mods and resource packs:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Collective
-Cristel Lib
-Dramatic Skys
-Fast Better Grass
-Fresh Animations
-Geckolib
-Guard Villagers
-HT's TreeChop
-Map Atlases [Forge]
-Mini Clock Tower
-Moonlight Lib
-Ore Harvester
-Towns and Towers
-Villager Golem Healer

</details>



These are just the mods that enhance the experience.
The mods listed below are the HORROR ones:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Arthropod Phobia Expansions + Horror Bosses / Arachnophobia
-Face of Horror
-Horror Cryptid: Sasquatch (Bigfoot)
-Horror messages
-Inside The system
-Paranoia (Horror)
-The Boy In The Bath [Horror, not a dweller]
-The Boiled One: Reimagined
-The God
-The Knocker
-The Man From The Fog
-The Plague Of The Moon
-Willow's Horror Cave Sounds

</details>
